title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Home and Hometown Questions
questions: Where is your hometown?
What is your hometown like?
Do you like living there? Why or why not?
What kind of home do you live in at the moment?
Is there anything you would like to change about your home?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Work and Study Questions
questions: Do you work or are you a student?
What subject are you studying, or what job do you do?
Why did you choose that subject or job?
What do you enjoy most about your work or studies?
Would you like to change your job or subject in the future?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Hobbies and Free Time Questions
questions: What do you like to do in your free time?
Do you have any hobbies that you have had since childhood?
Do you prefer to spend your free time alone or with other people?
Is there a new hobby you would like to try?
How has the way people spend their free time changed in recent years?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Food and Cooking Questions
questions: What kind of food do you like to eat?
Do you enjoy cooking? Why or why not?
Who usually does the cooking in your home?
Do you prefer eating at home or eating out?
Has your diet changed since you were a child?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Weather and Seasons Questions
questions: What is the weather usually like in your country?
Which is your favourite season of the year?
Does the weather ever affect the way you feel?
Do you prefer hot weather or cold weather?
Do you check the weather forecast before going out?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Technology and the Internet Questions
questions: How often do you use the internet?
What do you mainly use your phone for?
Do you think you spend too much time online?
How has technology changed the way you communicate with friends?
Is there any technology you would find hard to live without?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Travel and Holidays Questions
questions: Do you enjoy travelling?
Where did you go on your last holiday?
Do you prefer travelling by plane, train or car?
What kind of places do you like to visit on holiday?
Would you rather travel abroad or within your own country?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Music Questions
questions: What kind of music do you like to listen to?
When do you usually listen to music?
Have your musical tastes changed over the years?
Can you play any musical instruments?
Do you think it is important for children to learn music at school?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Sport and Exercise Questions
questions: Do you play any sports?
How often do you exercise?
Did you play any sports when you were a child?
Do you prefer watching sport or taking part in it?
What are the benefits of doing sport regularly?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Daily Routine Questions
questions: What does your typical day look like?
Are you a morning person or an evening person?
What is the first thing you do after you wake up?
Do you prefer weekdays or weekends?
Would you like to change anything about your daily routine?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Reading Questions
questions: Do you like reading? Why or why not?
What kind of books do you enjoy reading?
Do you prefer reading printed books or e-books?
Did your parents read to you when you were a child?
Do you think reading is still important in the digital age?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Shopping Questions
questions: Do you enjoy shopping?
Do you prefer shopping in stores or online?
How often do you go shopping?
Who do you usually go shopping with?
Have your shopping habits changed in recent years?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Friends Questions
questions: Do you have a large group of friends or just a few close ones?
How often do you see your friends?
What do you usually do together with your friends?
How did you meet your best friend?
Do you think it is easy to make new friends as an adult?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Nature and Animals Questions
questions: Do you like spending time in nature?
Do you have any pets, or did you have any as a child?
Are there many parks or green spaces where you live?
Do you think it is important to protect wild animals?
How often do you get the chance to be outdoors?

title: IELTS Speaking Part 1: Films and Television Questions
questions: Do you enjoy watching films?
What kind of films do you like best?
Do you prefer watching films at the cinema or at home?
How often do you watch television?
Have the programmes you watch changed since you were younger?
